items.name_en: Brand new arrival 🆕 24K Autumn/Winter Collection 🍃
items.name_cn:
Brand new arrival 🆕 24K Autumn/Winter Collection 🍃
Double Pocket Camera Bag Small Black ♥
Purchased at the counter for 44,500 RMB.
The trendy new favorite Double Pocket Camera Bag makes a cool debut.
Practical double pocket structure, cool and stylish 🆒
Fashionable light gold accents highlight luxury quality 〰️
It is the best companion to capture the beauty of life 🌟
Hardware: Thick plated 14k light gold buckle
Leather: ZP calfskin from the cutting department
Size: 13*23*15 cm
Model: AS5220

items.name_en: Brand new mini shopper basket, can hold all your small essentials. Cotton canvas lining with a street fashion-inspired print pattern. Comes with an included crossbody strap for hands-free functionality and better portability. Dimensions: 18.5-19-9.5, Style 65001

items.name_en: Brand Selected GG Mini Bag inspired by the styling of Gucci's iconic travel bag. Crafted from canvas, this bag features striped webbing handles and a detachable shoulder strap, reinterpreting classic brand elements and paying tribute to the brand's long heritage in luggage.
items.name_cn:
Brand Selected GG Mini Bag inspired by the styling of Gucci's iconic travel bag. Crafted from canvas, this bag features striped webbing handles and a detachable shoulder strap, reinterpreting classic brand elements and paying tribute to the brand's long heritage in luggage.
Beige and brown GG canvas
Brown leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Handle (10cm high)
Detachable adjustable leather shoulder strap (50cm high; length: 101.5cm)
Zipper closure
Model: 859975.
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 13cm (H) x 13cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.4kg
Color: Apricot canvas/Brown.
Made in Italy
